pdfs.raw_text:
# I AM THE CHANGE ## Scholarship Program — Home Visit Questionnaire Team Everest | Confidential | | | | |------------------------|---------------------------|-----------------------| | Volunteer Name: | Co-Volunteer Name: | Date of Visit: | | Thameem | Ansari | 10/06/26 | ## Section 1 — Student Profile ### 1.1. Application ID Enter Application ID CHEN - 2021 - 0321 ### 1.2. Student Full Name Enter full name Sneha, R. ### 1.3. Gender ☐ Male ☒ Female ☐ Others ## Section 2 — Family Background ### 2.1. Family Status ☐ Single Parent ☐ Parentless ☒ Having both parents ### 2.2. Relationship Details (if applicable) | Year of Death / Separation | Reason for Death / Separation | |----------------------------|-------------------------------| | — | — | | | — | ### **2.3. Is Father/ Mother photograph kept at home? ☒** ☒ Yes      ☐ No ### **2.4. Government ID Verified (Ration Card / Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Voter ID)** ☐ Aadhaar Card      ☒ Ration Card      ☐ Driving Licence      ☐ Voter ID☐ Other: \_\_\_\_\_ ### **2.5. Family Members** | Name | Age | Education | Occupation | Annual Income | |--------------|-----|------------------------|------------------|---------------| | S. Ravi | 47 | 10th | Civil contractor | | | R. Kalaselyi | 42 | 12th | Housewife | | | R. monika | 25 | B.Sc. M.Sc
Studying | Student | | | Sneha. R | 23 | B.com (MBA)
Working | Working | | ## **Section 3 — Housing Condition** ### **3.1. House Ownership** ☒ Own      ☐ Rented #### ** --- Page 2 --- 3.1.1 If rented, what is the rent amount?** Rent amount \_\_\_\_\_ ### **3.2. Type of Home** ☒ Individual      ☐ Private Apartment      ☐ Housing Board      ☐ Line House      ☐ Others: \_\_\_\_\_ ### **3.3. Type of Ceiling** ☐ Roof (Kurai) ☒ Tiled ☐ Asbestos / Sheet ☐ Concrete ### **3.4. Number of Bedrooms** Enter number 2 #### ** --- Page 3 --- 3.4.1 Type of Bedroom** ☒ Separate Bedroom ☐ No Separate Bedroom ### **3.5. Bathroom** ☒ Separate ☐ Common for Apartment ### **3.6. Kitchen Type** ☐ Separate Kitchen ☒ Hall with Kitchen ## **Section 4 — Financial Background** ### **4.1. Assets at Home (tick all that apply)** ☒ Washing Machine ☒ Fridge ☒ AC ☒ LED TV ☐ Two-Wheeler ☐ Car ☒ Smartphone ☒ Separate Wi-Fi ☐ Others: \_\_\_\_\_ ### **4.2. Amount of Last Electricity Bill** Amount in ₹ 6,000 ### **4.3. Do you own any other assets/properties in the name of grandparents, parents, or student?** ☒ Yes ☐ No #### **4.3.1 If yes, list their properties:** | Property Description | Owner Name | Approximate Value | |----------------------|------------|-------------------| |----------------------|------------|-------------------| | | | | |--|--|--| | | | | | | | | ### **4.4. Apart from your job, is there any other source of income?** ☐ Yes     ☒ No 4.4.1 If yes, list other sources of income: | Source of Income | Amount | |------------------|--------| | | | | | | ### **4.5. Income Type** ☐ Monthly     ☒ Daily     ☐ Weekly     ☐ Ad-Hoc ### **4.6. Do you have any loans?** ☐ Yes     ☒ No 4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount: | Sr. No. | Loan Purpose | Loan Amount Taken | Pending Loan Amount | |---------|--------------|-------------------|---------------------| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ### **4.7. If you choose any college, how much is the college fee?** Amount in ₹ 4.8. If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it? By taking educational loans, ~ 4.9. If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees? ## Section 5 — Health Information 5.1. Does the student have any health issues? ☐ Yes ☒ No 5.2. If yes, list the health issues: Describe health issues ## Section 6 — Student Commitment 6.1. Will you study college for three years without any obstacle? Yes 6.2. If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come? ☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Maybe 6.3. Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)? ☒ Yes ☐ No ## Section 7 — Scholarship Information 7.1. Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree? No. ## Section 8 — Volunteer Observation 8.1. What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition? Very bad experience, full of negativity and toxicness 8.2. Will you recommend this student for this scholarship? ☐ Yes ☒ No ☐ Not Sure 8.3. Any other comments you want to share? Nothing Volunteer Signature ![Handwritten signature of the volunteer](ab4e2b3fc7e7887b7a72f548aa6f5e60_img.jpg) Co-Volunteer Signature ![Handwritten signature of the co-volunteer](aab88c0d099e5d18d6533a97b13ec28d_img.jpg)
